important.subject: RE: Accessible // Luco proposal
important.snippet: Randy, It has been many……many months & ELEV8 has been compensated for zero of our effort on this project. What is your path forward. I am looking for honesty & no lip service. ** NEW BUFFALO OFFICE ADDRESS BELOW ** Adam Perrino, RA, CDT adam@elev8architecture.com<mailto:adam@elev8architecture.com> ELEV8 Architecture Buffalo Salt Lake City 4936 Ellicott Road 255 West 700 S Orchard Park, NY 14127 Salt Lake City UT 84101 (O) 1.888.88ELEV8 (M) 1.716.609.3319 www.elev8architecture.com<http://www.elev8architecture.com/> From: Randy Hendrickson <randy@randyhendrickson.com> Sent: Wednesday, April 15, 2026 2:13 PM To: Adam Perrino <adam@elev8architecture.com>; Restoration North <welcomehome@restoration-north.com> Cc: Punj Rajan <punj@goluco.com>; Harshad Chandak <harshad.chandak@outlook.com> Subject: Re: Accessible // Luco proposal Hey Adam! See attached, received yesterday from Luco. Their design team is producing final renders and pricing as we speak, so at long last I can get on the phone wi
important.reason: Email from a known contact regarding project compensation and path forward.
